name: Loop Body
description: Executes logic for each index in a provided list. Simulates loop body behavior in a single execution pass.
python_code:
import asyncio
async def execute(self, inputs):
    indices = inputs.get('indices')
    if indices is None: indices = []
    
    op = inputs.get('operation', 'Iteration')
    delay = float(inputs.get('delay', 0.0))
    
    self.log_info(f"Starting: {op} for {len(indices)} items.")
    
    # Explicitly set completed to False at start
    self.set_output('completed', False)
    
    results = []
    for i in indices:
        # Log using the operation string as a prefix
        self.log_info(f"{op} -> Index: {i}")
        
        # Stream the index to UI
        self.set_output('current_index', i)
        results.append(i)
        
        if delay > 0:
            await asyncio.sleep(delay)
            
    self.log_success(f"Finished: {op}")
    
    # FINALLY emit completed trigger
    self.set_output('completed', True)
    
    return {
        'results': results, 
        'current_index': indices[-1] if indices else None,
        'completed': True
    }
